title: calamus elongatus
intro: Calamus elongatus, also known as sweet flag or Acorus calamus, is a perennial plant native to Asia and Europe, characterized by its long, narrow leaves and small yellow flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of calamus elongatus include relief from digestive issues, such as bloating and gas, as well as relief from anxiety and insomnia. The plant can be prepared as an essential oil, tincture, or tea, and is also used in herbal remedies such as creams and ointments for topical application.
